tasks.description: Remove high-risk/weak tickers, propose candidates for replacement and run stock/ETF screeners.

subtasks.description: Determine and log tickers to remove based on step 3 analytics.
completion_evidence: Based on analytics, the following tickers are identified as high-risk, weak or redundant for removal or size-down: DGNX (ultra-high beta, extreme scenario losses, and speculative profile), CRDO, ARM, APP (all have high scenario drawdowns, elevated beta, and show high loss potential in multiple macro stress scenarios - especially in scenarios such as credit crunch, fed overtightening, and tariff crash). These also overlap and cluster in high-correlation groups within tech/growth, amplifying systemic risk. FR, IIPR, and STAG REITs are all highly correlated (FR-STAG 0.84, FR-TRNO 0.87), report weak risk-adjusted returns, and contribute heavily to drawdown clusters, so at least one/two should be removed or reduced. EQIX's return/risk profile is currently weak, and allocation appears high versus overall contribution. Summary: Remove or aggressive cut: DGNX, CRDO, FR, APP, ARM. Consider reducing: EQIX, IIPR, STAG, TRNO. Justification: persistent high beta, repeated tail losses, redundancy/correlation, or poor forward profile.

subtasks.description: Call stock_screener with constraints for high quality, low beta, high risk-adjusted return stocks.
Call stock_screener at least twice more with small constraint variations and include ETF screening.

observations:
Tool 'portfolio_exposure_calculator' returned: data:

success: true

tasks.description: Construct new candidate/optimized portfolio and log it.

subtasks.description: Define the new/optimized portfolio in strict JSON, allocating replacements appropriately.
Log the new candidate portfolio and rationale to episodic memory using episodic_remember.

tasks.description: Run iterative analytics on the candidate portfolio to further optimize and validate improvements.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_ticker_performances, calculate_portfolio_performance, and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index on the candidate portfolio for risk/return insights.
Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix on new portfolio for updated correlations.
If any metrics fail to show needed improvement, revise tickers/allocations using further stock_screener calls and re-test.

tasks.description: Output the finalized optimized portfolio and changes in required JSON format.

subtasks.description: Output the new/optimized portfolio and the changes section in strict required JSON formatting. No tool required.

execution_history.evidence: Based on analytics, the following tickers are identified as high-risk, weak or redundant for removal or size-down: DGNX (ultra-high beta, extreme scenario losses, and speculative profile), CRDO, ARM, APP (all have high scenario drawdowns, elevated beta, and show high loss potential in multiple macro stress scenarios - especially in scenarios such as credit crunch, fed overtightening, and tariff crash). These also overlap and cluster in high-correlation groups within tech/growth, amplifying systemic risk. FR, IIPR, and STAG REITs are all highly correlated (FR-STAG 0.84, FR-TRNO 0.87), report weak risk-adjusted returns, and contribute heavily to drawdown clusters, so at least one/two should be removed or reduced. EQIX's return/risk profile is currently weak, and allocation appears high versus overall contribution. Summary: Remove or aggressive cut: DGNX, CRDO, FR, APP, ARM. Consider reducing: EQIX, IIPR, STAG, TRNO. Justification: persistent high beta, repeated tail losses, redundancy/correlation, or poor forward profile.
